original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 6 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH min_supplycosts AS (
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey, 
        MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_ps_supplycost
    FROM partsupp
    INNER JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
    INNER JOIN nation ON nation.n_nationkey = supplier.s_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region ON region.r_regionkey = nation.n_regionkey
    WHERE region.r_name = 'EUROPE'
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
    s.s_acctbal, 
    s.s_name, 
    n.n_name, 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_mfgr, 
    s.s_address, 
    s.s_phone, 
    s.s_comment
FROM part p
INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
INNER JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
INNER JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
INNER JOIN min_supplycosts m ON p.p_partkey = m.ps_partkey 
    AND ps.ps_supplycost = m.min_ps_supplycost
WHERE 
    p.p_size = 6 
    AND p.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
ORDER BY 
    s.s_acctbal DESC, 
    n.n_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    p.p_partkey

  n.n_name, 
  SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
  region r
  JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
  JOIN customer c ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
  JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
  JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
  JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
    AND s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
  r.r_name = 'AMERICA'
  AND o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1993-01-01'

original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'CANADA' and n2.n_name = 'CHINA') or (n1.n_name = 'CHINA' and n2.n_name = 'CANADA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    supp_nation, 
    cust_nation, 
    l_year, 
    SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
    SELECT 
        n1.n_name AS supp_nation, 
        n2.n_name AS cust_nation, 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year, 
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM lineitem
    JOIN supplier ON lineitem.l_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey 
        AND n1.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey 
        AND n2.n_name IN ('CANADA', 'CHINA')
    WHERE 
        l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
        AND n1.n_name <> n2.n_name
) AS shipping
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
    n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    supplier
    JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
    JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    (n1.n_name, n2.n_name) IN (('ETHIOPIA', 'FRANCE'), ('FRANCE', 'ETHIOPIA'))
    AND l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    n1.n_name, 
    n2.n_name, 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate)
ORDER BY 
    supp_nation, 
    cust_nation, 
    l_year;

original_query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'UNITED STATES' and n2.n_name = 'ALGERIA') or (n1.n_name = 'ALGERIA' and n2.n_name = 'UNITED STATES') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
)
SELECT 
     supp_nation, 
     cust_nation, 
     l_year, 
     SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
     SELECT 
         n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
         n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
         EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
         l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
     FROM 
         supplier
         JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'UNITED STATES'
         JOIN filtered_lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = filtered_lineitem.l_suppkey
         JOIN orders ON filtered_lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
         JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
         JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'ALGERIA'
     UNION ALL
     SELECT 
         n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
         n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
         EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
         l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
     FROM 
         supplier
         JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'ALGERIA'
         JOIN filtered_lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = filtered_lineitem.l_suppkey
         JOIN orders ON filtered_lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
         JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
         JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'UNITED STATES'
) AS shipping
GROUP BY 
     supp_nation, 
     cust_nation, 
     l_year
ORDER BY 
     supp_nation, 
     cust_nation, 
     l_year;

    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name

    JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey

)

    SELECT

        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS volume,

        JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

    WHERE 
        p.p_type = 'LARGE BURNISHED TIN'
        AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'

SELECT 
    ps_partkey, 
    value
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ps_partkey, 
        SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS value,
        SUM(SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty)) OVER () * 0.0001000000 AS threshold
    FROM 
        partsupp
        JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey

    WHERE 
        nation.n_name = 'ROMANIA'
    GROUP BY 
        ps_partkey
) t
WHERE 
    value > threshold
ORDER BY 
    value DESC;

original_query: select s_name, count(*) as numwait from supplier, lineitem l1, orders, nation where s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and o_orderstatus = 'F' and l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate and exists ( select * from lineitem l2 where l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey ) and not exists ( select * from lineitem l3 where l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey and l3.l_receiptdate > l3.l_commitdate ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'MOZAMBIQUE' group by s_name order by numwait desc, s_name limit 100;

with order_stats as (
    select 
        l_orderkey,
        count(distinct l_suppkey) as num_suppliers,
        count(distinct case when l_receiptdate > l_commitdate then l_suppkey end) as num_delayed_suppliers
    from lineitem
    group by l_orderkey
)
select s_name, count(*) as numwait
from supplier
join nation on supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey and nation.n_name = 'MOZAMBIQUE'
join lineitem l1 on supplier.s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey
join orders on orders.o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and orders.o_orderstatus = 'F'
join order_stats os on l1.l_orderkey = os.l_orderkey
where 
    l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate
    and os.num_suppliers >= 2
    and os.num_delayed_suppliers = 1
group by s_name
order by numwait desc, s_name
limit 100;
